starting_year.label: Starting Year
starting_year.description: The in-world year the story begins on

starting_month.label: Starting Month
starting_month.description: The in-world month the story begins on (1-12)

starting_day.label: Starting Day
starting_day.description: The in-world day of the month the story begins on

starting_hour.label: Starting Hour
starting_hour.description: The in-world hour (0-23) the story begins on

days_per_month.label: Days Per Month
days_per_month.description: Number of days in each in-world month, used to roll days into months

months_per_year.label: Months Per Year
months_per_year.description: Number of months in each in-world year, used to roll months into years

mutation_schema.time_elapsed_minutes: integer, your best estimate of how many in-world minutes passed during the scene just narrated. Use the pacing of the narration as a guide: a short exchange or single action ~5-15 minutes, a conversation or exploring a room ~15-60 minutes, travel across a town or short journey ~30-180 minutes, a long journey or montage ~360-1440 minutes, sleeping through the night ~480 minutes. Use 0 only if the narration explicitly described no time passing (e.g. a pause mid-action).
